Hero.subtitle: Communication, useful services, mini-apps and artificial intelligence, united in a single modern and responsible platform.

Problem.title: Why another app?
Problem.card1_desc: Too many apps to manage your daily life (messaging, tasks, documents...).
Problem.card2_desc: Your data is often exploited without your real consent for targeted advertising.
Problem.card3_desc: Overloaded interfaces that unnecessarily complicate your exchanges and organization.

Vision.title: The ImuChat Vision
Vision.description: More than a messaging app. A unified platform that creates time and respects your data. Inspired by Asian super-apps, adapted to European privacy standards.
Vision.feat1_desc: Fluid chats (Matrix protocol), encrypted audio/video, and instant local translation.
Vision.feat2_desc: Access your favorite services without installing 50 different apps.

Audience.title: For whom?
Audience.subtitle: An experience adapted to every moment of your life.
Audience.card1_desc: Manage your group projects, share your notes, and organize your social life without distraction. Focus Mode integrated.
Audience.card2_desc: A private and secure space to share photos, planning and news. Kawaii themes available to customize your exchanges.
Audience.card3_desc: Communicate effectively with your teams or members. Role management, private channels and planning tools.

Engagement.title: The ImuChat Commitment
Engagement.stat2_sub: Your attention is not for sale.

Footer.description: ImuChat is an ambitious student project developed with the support of the University Pole and local actors.
Footer.tagline: The European super-app that respects your data.

hero.label: Product Vision
hero.title: More than messaging, a platform
hero.subtitle: ImuChat reinvents the super-app by bringing together communication, everyday services and artificial intelligence in a single data-respectful experience.

what.title: What is ImuChat?
what.description: A modular, open and respectful platform that simplifies your digital life.
what.feature1_desc: Instant communication, HD audio/video calls, transcribed voice messages, and real-time translation.
what.feature2_desc: Access useful services without leaving the app: transport, documents, organization, and more.
what.feature3_desc: Contextual AI assistants to help you with your daily tasks while respecting your privacy.
what.feature4_desc: Available on Web, iOS, Android, Windows, macOS and Linux. Seamless synchronization.
what.feature5_desc: End-to-end encryption, GDPR compliance, no targeted advertising. Your data belongs to you.
what.feature6_desc: Activate only the features you need. Total customization of your experience.

usecases.title: Use Cases
usecases.description: ImuChat adapts to your needs, whether you're a student, family or team.
usecases.student_desc: Manage your group projects, share your notes and organize your student life efficiently.
usecases.family_desc: A secure space to share moments, organize daily life and stay connected.
usecases.family_feat1: Shared photo albums with secure storage
usecases.org_desc: Professional communication with role management, private channels and collaboration tools.

philosophy.title: Our philosophy
philosophy.description: ImuChat is the ambition of a European super-app that truly respects its users. Inspired by Asian innovations, rooted in European values of data protection and transparency.

hero.label: 50+ Features
hero.title: A complete ecosystem
hero.subtitle: From messaging to everyday services, discover all the features that make ImuChat much more than just an app.

messaging.title: Messaging & Communication
messaging.g1_f1: Instant messaging with emojis and GIFs

calls.title: Audio & Video Calls
calls.g2_f2: HD video calls with noise reduction

personalization.title: Advanced Personalization
personalization.g4_f1: Visual themes (Kawaii, Pro, Night, Solar, Neon)

social.title: Social Mini-Apps
social.description: Connect differently with your loved ones

cta.title: Ready to discover ImuChat?
cta.description: Join the waitlist to be among the first to test the beta version.

hero.label: Artificial Intelligence
hero.title: An AI that understands you
hero.subtitle: Smart and contextual assistants to simplify your daily life, all with absolute respect for your privacy.

assistants.title: Multi-Persona AI Assistants
assistants.description: Choose the assistant suited to your current need

chat.title: Personal Assistant
chat.desc: Daily help to organize your tasks and answer your questions.

coach.title: Coach & Mentor
coach.desc: Personalized support to achieve your goals.

creative.title: Creative Assistant
creative.desc: Idea generation, brainstorming and creative help.

research.title: Research Assistant
research.desc: Document analysis, information synthesis and in-depth research.

suggestions.title: Smart Suggestions
suggestions.desc: Contextual automatic replies that adapt to your communication style and conversation context.

translation.title: Instant Translation
translation.desc: Communicate without language barriers with real-time translation in over 100 languages.

summary.title: Conversation Summary
summary.desc: No more wasting time re-reading long discussions. AI generates clear and concise summaries.

moderation.title: Automatic Moderation
moderation.desc: Smart protection against spam, inappropriate content and toxic behavior in your groups.

contextual.title: Contextual Understanding
contextual.desc: AI understands the context of your conversations to provide relevant responses and suggestions.

personalized.title: Personalized Experience
personalized.desc: AI learns from your preferences to offer an experience tailored to your usage.

privacy.title: An AI that respects your data
privacy.description: We believe that artificial intelligence and privacy protection are not incompatible. Our approach ensures that your personal data remains private.

point1.title: Local processing when possible
point1.desc: Lightweight AI models run directly on your device to avoid sending data.

point2.title: End-to-end encryption
point2.desc: Even for AI processing requiring the cloud, your data is encrypted.

point3.title: No data resale
point3.desc: Your conversations and information are never used to train third-party models.

point4.title: Total control
point4.desc: You decide which AI features to activate and can disable them at any time.

cta.title: Discover responsible AI
cta.description: Experience artificial intelligence that truly respects your data.

hero.label: For Developers
hero.title: Build on ImuChat
hero.subtitle: An open platform with public API, complete SDK and mini-apps marketplace. Create unique experiences for millions of users.

miniapps.title: Mini-Apps Platform
miniapps.description: Develop applications that integrate natively into the ImuChat ecosystem

what.title: What is a Mini-App?
what.description: Mini-apps are lightweight applications that run directly in ImuChat, offering a smooth experience without additional installation.
what.point1: Simple development with HTML/CSS/JS or modern frameworks
what.point2: Secure access to ImuChat APIs via SDK

feat1.title: Modular & Flexible
feat1.desc: Create simple or complex apps according to your needs. Support React, Vue, Svelte...

feat2.title: Optimal Performance
feat2.desc: Optimized runtime for smooth experiences even on mobile.

feat3.title: Granular Permissions
feat3.desc: Transparent permission system to protect users.

api.title: Public API & SDK
api.description: Integrate ImuChat into your services or create new experiences

resources.title: Developer Resources
resources.description: Everything you need to get started

docs.title: Complete Documentation
docs.desc: Detailed guides, API reference, tutorials and code examples.

quickstart.title: Quick Start
quickstart.desc: Create your first mini-app in less than 10 minutes.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Join Discord, ask questions and share your creations.

cta.title: Ready to develop?
cta.description: Access the documentation and create your first mini-app today.

hero.label: About ImuChat
hero.title: Our story
hero.subtitle: An ambitious student project to reinvent digital communication with a European approach.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Create a super-app that simplifies digital life without compromising privacy. An open, modular and respectful platform that meets real user needs.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Become the European reference for super-apps, combining Asian innovation with European values of data protection and transparency.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: The principles that guide every decision we make

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: Your data belongs to you. End-to-end encryption, strict GDPR compliance, zero data resale.

openness.title: Openness & Community
openness.desc: Open API, accessible SDK, developer marketplace. We build with the community.

innovation.title: Responsible Innovation
innovation.desc: Adopting the best technologies while questioning their impact on society and the environment.

story.title: The project's story
story.p1: ImuChat was born from a frustration: why do we have to juggle dozens of apps to manage our daily life? Messaging, transport, organization, public services... everything is fragmented.
story.p2: Inspired by Asian super-apps like WeChat and LINE, but aware of privacy issues, we imagined a European alternative: a unified platform that truly respects its users.
story.p3: What started as a student project has become an ambitious vision: create the first European super-app, privacy-respectful, open to developers, and built to last.

incubation.title: PEPITE incubated project
incubation.description: ImuChat is supported by the PEPITE program, which helps student entrepreneurs develop their innovative projects.

location.title: Designed in Europe 🇪🇺
location.description: Developed with the support of universities and the local entrepreneurial ecosystem. 100% European innovation, designed for the world.

hero.label: Contact Us
hero.title: Let's talk about your project
hero.subtitle: Whether you're a potential partner, media or simply curious, we're here to listen.

form.privacy: Your data is processed in accordance with GDPR and will never be shared.

hero.label: Privacy Policy
hero.title: Your data belongs to you
hero.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: ImuChat is committed to protecting the privacy of its users. This policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable European laws.

collection.title: Data Collection
collection.intro: We only collect data necessary for the operation of our services:

usage.title: Data Usage
usage.intro: Your data is used exclusively to:
purposes: Analyze usage to improve user experience

protection.title: Data Protection
measures: Secure storage with encryption at rest

rights.title: Your GDPR Rights
rights.intro: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:
list: Right of access: Access your personal data
Right of rectification: Correct inaccurate information
Right to be forgotten: Delete your account and data
Right to portability: Export your data
Right to object: Refuse certain processing
Right to restriction: Limit the processing of your data

cookies.title: Cookies and Trackers
cookies.intro: ImuChat uses cookies strictly necessary for the application to function.
cookies.content: We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies. You can manage your cookie preferences in your browser settings.

updates.title: Policy Updates
updates.content: We reserve the right to modify this policy. Significant changes will be notified to you by email or via the application. The last update date is always displayed at the top of this page.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For any questions regarding this policy or your personal data, contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO):

hero.label: Terms of Service
hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using ImuChat.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: These Terms of Service (ToS) govern the use of the ImuChat platform and its services. By creating an account or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing ImuChat or using our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these ToS and our Privacy Policy. If you do not accept these terms, you must not use our services.
acceptance.highlight: ⚠️ You must be at least 13 years old to use ImuChat. Users under 16 must obtain parental consent.

account.title: Account Creation and Management
account.intro: To use ImuChat, you must create an account. You are responsible for:
responsibilities: Providing accurate and up-to-date information during registration
Maintaining the security of your password and account
All activities performed through your account
Immediately notifying ImuChat in case of unauthorized use of your account

usage.title: Acceptable Use
usage.intro: You agree to use ImuChat responsibly and in compliance with the law.

allowed.title: Permitted uses:
items: Sharing content that complies with these ToS

prohibited.title: Prohibited uses:
items: Dissemination of illegal, hateful, violent, or pornographic content
Harassment, intimidation, or threats against other users
Attempts to gain unauthorized access to ImuChat systems
Use of bots or unauthorized automation

content.title: User Content
content.intro: You retain all rights to the content you post on ImuChat. By posting content, you grant us:
rights: A non-exclusive license to store, process, and transmit your content
The right to moderate and remove content violating our ToS
You are solely responsible for the content you post
You warrant that you hold all necessary rights to your content

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.intro: ImuChat strives to provide a reliable service, but:
limits: The service is provided "as is" without guarantee of uninterrupted availability
We are not responsible for content posted by users
We do not guarantee the accuracy of information provided by third parties
Our liability is limited to the extent permitted by law

modifications.title: Modifications to ToS
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these ToS at any time. Significant changes will be notified by email or via the application. Continued use after notification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

termination.title: Termination
termination.intro: We may suspend or terminate your account in case of:
reasons: Request from you (you can delete your account at any time)

contact.title: Legal Questions
contact.content: For any questions regarding these ToS, contact our legal department:

hero.label: Legal Notice
hero.title: Legal Notice
hero.subtitle: Legal information regarding the publisher of the ImuChat website and platform.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.address: 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA

content.p1: All content on the ImuChat website (texts, images, graphics, logo, icons, photos, videos, etc.) is the exclusive property of ImuChat or its partners, unless otherwise stated.
content.p2: Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, adaptation of all or part of the site's elements, regardless of the means or process used, is prohibited without prior written authorization from ImuChat.
content.p3: The name "ImuChat", the logo and all distinctive signs reproduced on the site are registered trademarks or in the process of being registered. Any unauthorized use constitutes counterfeiting subject to legal prosecution.

data.title: Personal Data

dpo.title: The data controller is ImuChat. A Data Protection Officer (DPO) is designated:

data.policy: For more information on how your data is managed, see our Privacy Policy.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: The ImuChat website uses cookies strictly necessary for the application to function. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used. For more information, see our Cookie Policy.

law.title: Applicable Law
law.content: These legal notices are governed by French and European law (GDPR). The site complies with Law No. 2004-575 of June 21, 2004 for confidence in the digital economy.
law.disputes: In case of dispute, an amicable solution will be sought before any legal action. Failing this, French courts will have sole jurisdiction.

contact.title: Contact for Legal Questions
contact.content: For any questions regarding these legal notices or our practices:
contact.response: We commit to responding within 48 business hours.
